mapper.select: SELECT SUM(sum_dwell_sec) AS sumDwellSec, SUM(dwell_count) AS dwellCount, CASE WHEN SUM(dwell_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(sum_dwell_sec) / SUM(dwell_count) END AS avgDwellSec FROM stat_visit_point WHERE exhibition_id = #{exhibitionId} AND stat_date = #{statDate}

SELECT SUM(sum_dwell_sec) AS sumDwellSec, SUM(dwell_count) AS dwellCount, CASE WHEN SUM(dwell_count) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE SUM(sum_dwell_sec) / SUM(dwell_count) END AS avgDwellSec FROM stat_visit_point WHERE exhibition_id = #{exhibitionId}
